title: NumberOfRatingAgenciesEnum
description: The enumerated values to define the number of Rating Agencies that must be considered to meet the rating condition.

oneOf.title: All
oneOf.description: Ratings for all defined Rating Agencies will be considered.

oneOf.title: AnyOne
oneOf.description: Ratings for Any 1 stated Rating Agency will be applicable.

oneOf.title: AnyTwo
oneOf.description: Ratings for Any 2 stated Rating Agencies will be applicable.

oneOf.title: Other
oneOf.description: Utilised where the clause data structure is not able to capture a material aspect of the clause.
